_note: City of Maplewood — FY27-28 test scenario. Load via the Demo City picker on the Build Model overview. Exercises Planning, Building, Engineering, Parks & Recreation, Police Services, and Fire Prevention as fee-bearing departments.

Recreation programs heavily subsidized — community benefit policy
Full cost recovery for non-emergency administrative services

functionalAllocation.name: Current Planning
functionalAllocation.description: Entitlement review, discretionary permits, applicant coordination, environmental review, and hearing support for active development applications.

functionalAllocation.name: Planning Counter
functionalAllocation.description: Zoning questions, permit intake support, pre-application guidance, and general public assistance not always tied to a billable application.

functionalAllocation.name: Long Range Planning
functionalAllocation.description: General Plan maintenance, zoning ordinance updates, housing policy, and community planning work funded as broad public benefit activity.

functionalAllocation.name: Code Compliance
functionalAllocation.description: Zoning and land-use compliance investigations, notices, follow-up inspections, and recoverable enforcement activity where allowed.

functionalAllocation.name: Plan Check
functionalAllocation.description: Building code review of construction documents, structural review, energy review, accessibility review, and correction cycles.

functionalAllocation.name: Inspections
functionalAllocation.description: Field inspections, reinspection work, inspection scheduling, and inspection record administration through project completion.

functionalAllocation.name: Permit Issuance
functionalAllocation.description: Permit intake, valuation review, fee calculation, issuance, records, and applicant-facing permit administration.

functionalAllocation.name: Public Assistance
functionalAllocation.description: General code questions, owner-builder guidance, counter assistance, and non-project-specific public information.

functionalAllocation.name: Private Development Review
functionalAllocation.description: Engineering review of grading, drainage, frontage improvements, subdivisions, and development conditions of approval.

functionalAllocation.name: Encroachment Permits
functionalAllocation.description: Review, inspection, and closeout of work in the public right-of-way, including utility and frontage work.

functionalAllocation.name: Capital Projects
functionalAllocation.description: Design, delivery, and coordination of City capital infrastructure projects funded through capital appropriations.

functionalAllocation.name: Traffic and Transportation Review
functionalAllocation.description: Traffic impact review, transportation conditions, work-zone traffic control, and citywide transportation support.

functionalAllocation.name: Facility Rentals
functionalAllocation.description: Reservation intake, facility coordination, rental support, setup review, and customer service for rentable public facilities.

functionalAllocation.name: Special Events
functionalAllocation.description: Event permit review, interdepartmental routing, site coordination, and event-day public service support.

functionalAllocation.name: Recreation Programs
functionalAllocation.description: Program registration, class coordination, instructor support, and fee-supported recreation programming.

functionalAllocation.name: Community Benefit
functionalAllocation.description: Open access park support, community outreach, non-fee events, and general recreation services with broad public benefit.

functionalAllocation.name: Records and Reports
functionalAllocation.description: Police report processing, records requests, clearance letters, and recoverable public records services.

functionalAllocation.name: Permits and Reviews
functionalAllocation.description: Alarm permits, special event review, background review, and other fee-supported police administrative permits.

functionalAllocation.name: Code and Parking Support
functionalAllocation.description: Parking enforcement support, municipal code response, and recoverable enforcement activity where legally allowed.

functionalAllocation.name: Patrol and Public Safety
functionalAllocation.description: Core patrol, emergency response, investigations, and general public safety activity funded as public benefit service.

functionalAllocation.name: Fire Plan Review
functionalAllocation.description: Fire code review of development and construction plans, fire protection systems, access, and life-safety requirements.

functionalAllocation.name: Fire Inspections
functionalAllocation.description: Operational permits, business inspections, reinspection work, and inspection record administration.

functionalAllocation.name: Prevention Programs
functionalAllocation.description: Public education, defensible space outreach, emergency preparedness, and community risk-reduction programs.

functionalAllocation.name: Emergency Response
functionalAllocation.description: Emergency response readiness and response activity funded primarily as broad public safety service.
